Spurs' four-game schedule for the Las Vegas Summer League will kick off against Atlanta and former Brennan and University of Houston standout Kingston Flemings at 3:30 p.m. on July 9, the NBA announced Friday.

ESPN2 is set to broadcast the game.

items.title: If Martin is guaranteed, I would have to think one of Mogbo or TJD isn't coming back. There are only so many guaranteed spots to go around for a team so close to tax. Battle will give them 11 guarantees. Martin 12. Leaves a max of 3 roster spots with no Mamu/anyone else.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: If Martin is guaranteed, I would have to think one of Mogbo or TJD isn't coming back. There are only so many guaranteed spots to go around for a team so close to tax. Battle will give them 11 guarantees. Martin 12. Leaves a max of 3 roster spots with no Mamu/anyone else.

items.title: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.

items.title: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier to
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier today.

items.title: 13 players were drafted in 2025 outside of the lottery and cleared 1000 minutes as rookies
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
13 players were drafted in 2025 outside of the lottery and cleared 1000 minutes as rookies

The only one of those 13 players that did so for a playoff team was Hugo Gonzalez, who played for a team that blew a 3-1 lead in the East quarterfinals
